title: Pizza Mod
description: This mod adds Pizza to minecraft
body:
# PIZZA MOD

Since its creation, minecraft has missed one thing. Pizza. This mod fixes it. It adds 4 types of pizza, 4 toppings and beer.


### What Makes Thiss Pizza Mod different from the Others?

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Absolutely nothing.

I would like you to download it but you dont have to.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

check out this random one if u want:
> https://modrinth.com/mod/pizza-mod

they got the url i wanted :(

</details>

</details>
